inputs.name: autoResponsive
inputs.description:
Whether DynamicPage should have responsive sides spacing changing with Page window width.
max-width: 599px                         - small
min-width: 600px and max-width: 1023px   - medium
min-width: 1024px and max-width: 1439px  - large
min-width: 1440px                        - extra large

inputs.name: background
inputs.description:
sets background for content to `list`, `transparent`, or `solid` background color.
Default is `solid`.

inputs.name: disableSnapOnScroll
inputs.description: Whether DynamicPage should snap on scroll

inputs.name: expandContent
inputs.description: Whether dynamic page should be expanded in whole page.

inputs.name: headingLevel
inputs.description: Heading level of the dynamic page header title.

inputs.name: offset
inputs.description:
provided offset in px
Should be added, when there is something else at the bottom and dynamic page is not expanded to bottom's corners

inputs.name: size
inputs.description:
sets size which in turn adds corresponding padding for the size type.
size can be `small`, `medium`, `large`, or `extra-large`.

inputs.name: stackContent
inputs.description: Whether or not tabs should be stacked.

methods.name: refreshSize
methods.description: Triggers recheck for spacing and sizing of elements inside DynamicPage.

methods.name: setSelectedTab
methods.description: marks the dynamic page tab as selected when the id of the tab is passed

methods.name: toggleCollapse
methods.description: toggle the visibility of the header on click of title area.
